free_text: Absolute differential cross section of the 9Be(d,p)10Be
and 10B(d,p)11B reactions at deuteron energy
E (d)>= 2.5 MeV
The targets were obtained by vacuum evaporation of
metallic beryllium of B203 (95% 10B enriched)
on polyvinil formal backings. The measurements of the
target thickness were performed only for the target
used to obtain the data at Ed=2 MeV and theta=90 degr.
and were 0.34 um for the 9Be and 0.09 um for the
B2O3 target.
The errors on the absolute values of the cross
sections
The uncertainty in the target thickness
The uncertainty in the detector solid angle
The statistic errors
Surface-barrier
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
EN-ERR -> EN-ERR-DIG; DATA-ERR -> ERR-DIG.
Fig.1 from Lett.Nuovo Cim.,5(1972)879
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
